name: aggregate_bindings
description: Aggregate element ids are exposed as source-variable bindings instead of opaque positional groups.
program:
reg("pat1","bed").
duration("pat1",1,2).
preparation_time(RID,DUR) :- reg(RID,_), DUR = #sum{D,PH: duration(RID,PH,D), PH != 4}.

expected_truth.reg(\"pat1\",\"bed\"), 2 = #sum{D,PH: du: the aggregate condition is true and contributes to the result; expand to see how
